aloo-gobi.title: Aloo Gobi
aloo-gobi.description: Dry curry made with potatoes and cauliflower tempered with aromatic spices. A classic North Indian dish.
instructions: Cut potatoes and cauliflower into small florets.
Heat oil in a pan and add cumin seeds.
Add sliced onion and sauté until golden.
Add potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Cover and cook on low heat for 15-20 minutes.
Add garam masala and serve hot.

apple-pie.title: Apple Pie
apple-pie.description: Classic American dessert with sweet apples in a flaky crust.
instructions: Slice apples and mix with sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Place one crust in pie dish.
Cover with second crust and seal edges.

avocado-toast.title: Avocado Toast
avocado-toast.description: Healthy breakfast with creamy avocado on crispy toast.
instructions: Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve.

baingan-bharta.title: Baingan Bharta
baingan-bharta.description: Smoky mashed eggplant with spices. A Punjabi delicacy.
instructions: Roast eggplants on flame until charred.
Peel and mash the roasted eggplant.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.

brownies.title: Chocolate Brownies
instructions: Melt butter and mix with sugar.
Mix in cocoa, flour, and salt.

burritos.title: Chicken Burritos
burritos.description: Mexican wrap with seasoned chicken, beans, and rice.
instructions: Spread chicken, rice, beans on tortilla.
Add salsa, cheese, sour cream, lettuce.

butter-chicken.title: Butter Chicken
butter-chicken.description: Creamy tomato-based curry with tender chicken pieces.
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt for 2 hours.
Grill or pan-fry chicken and set aside.
In a pan, melt butter and sauté onion.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add grilled chicken and cook for 10 minutes.

caesar-salad.title: Caesar Salad
caesar-salad.description: Crisp romaine lettuce with creamy Caesar dressing.

cheesecake.title: New York Cheesecake
cheesecake.description: Rich and creamy cheesecake with graham cracker crust.
instructions: Mix graham crumbs with butter and press into pan.
Add sugar and eggs one by one.
Cool in oven with door ajar.

chicken-65.title: Chicken 65
chicken-65.description: Spicy deep-fried chicken appetizer from Chennai.
instructions: Marinate with spices and egg for 1 hour.
Deep fry until golden and crispy.
Mix chicken with fried curry leaves.

chicken-biryani.title: Chicken Biryani
chicken-biryani.description: Layered rice dish with spiced chicken and aromatic herbs.
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 2 hours.
Layer rice and chicken in pot.

chicken-curry.title: Chicken Curry
chicken-curry.description: Comforting Indian-style chicken in spicy gravy.
instructions: Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add water and simmer for 20 minutes.

chicken-manchurian.title: Chicken Manchurian
chicken-manchurian.description: Crispy chicken in sweet and spicy sauce. Indo-Chinese favorite.
instructions: Marinate chicken in flour and egg.

chicken-shawarma.title: Chicken Shawarma
chicken-shawarma.description: Middle Eastern spiced chicken in pita bread.

chicken-tikka-masala.title: Chicken Tikka Masala
chicken-tikka-masala.description: Grilled chunks in creamy spiced tomato sauce.
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt for 4 hours.

chocolate-chip-cookies.title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
chocolate-chip-cookies.description: Chewy cookies with melty chocolate chips.
instructions: Mix flour, baking soda, and salt.

churros.title: Churros
churros.description: Fried dough sticks with cinnamon sugar.
instructions: Beat in eggs one by one.

dal-makhani.title: Dal Makhani
dal-makhani.description: Slow-cooked black lentils in creamy tomato gravy.

dal-tadka.title: Dal Tadka
dal-tadka.description: Tempered yellow lentils. Comfort food from India.
instructions: In a tadka pan, heat ghee.

dhokla.title: Dhokla
instructions: Add fruit salt and let rest.
Pour batter and steam for 15 minutes.
For tadka, heat oil and add mustard.

egg-benedict.title: Eggs Benedict
egg-benedict.description: Poached eggs on English muffin with hollandaise.
instructions: Make hollandaise: whisk yolks over double boiler.

enchiladas.title: Chicken Enchiladas
enchiladas.description: Rolled tortillas with chicken and cheese sauce.

falafel.title: Falafel
falafel.description: Crispy chickpea fritters from Middle East.

fish-and-chips.title: Fish and Chips
fish-and-chips.description: Beer-battered fish with crispy chips. British classic.
instructions: Make batter with flour and beer.
Serve with chips and tartar sauce.

fish-curry.title: Fish Curry
fish-curry.description: Tangy fish curry with coconut milk.
instructions: Add coconut milk and bring to boil.

fruit-salad.title: Fruit Salad
fruit-salad.description: Fresh seasonal fruits with honey-lime dressing.

garlic-naan.title: Garlic Naan
garlic-naan.description: Soft Indian bread with garlic butter.

gobi-manchurian.title: Gobi Manchurian
instructions: Make a batter with flour, cornstarch, and enough water to coat the florets.

green-thai-curry.title: Green Thai Curry
green-thai-curry.description: Fragrant Thai green curry with creamy coconut milk, fresh vegetables, and tofu. A rich, aromatic plant-based version of the classic Thai dish.
instructions: Press tofu and cut into cubes.
Heat a pan and fry tofu until golden. Set aside.
In the same pan, fry green curry paste in 1 tbsp oil for 1 minute.
Add coconut milk and vegetable broth, bring to a simmer.
Add bamboo shoots, Thai eggplant, and kaffir lime leaves.
Stir in soy sauce and palm sugar.
Add fried tofu and simmer for 10 minutes.
Finish with Thai basil leaves and serve with jasmine rice.

grilled-salmon.title: Grilled Salmon
instructions: Mix oil, lemon juice, garlic, dill.

gulab-jamun.title: Gulab Jamun
gulab-jamun.description: Deep-fried milk balls in sugar syrup.
instructions: Mix milk powder, flour, ghee, soda.
Knead with milk into soft dough.
Soak fried balls in warm syrup.

hakka-noodles.title: Hakka Noodles
instructions: Add soy sauce and sesame oil.

hyderabadi-haleem.title: Hyderabadi Haleem
hyderabadi-haleem.description: Thick wheat and meat stew from Hyderabad.
instructions: Mash wheat and add to meat.

idli-sambar.title: Idli Sambar
idli-sambar.description: Steamed rice cakes with lentil stew.
instructions: Temper with mustard and curry leaves.

jalebi.title: Jalebi
instructions: Mix flour, yogurt, soda into batter.

jeera-rice.title: Jeera Rice
instructions: Heat ghee and add whole spices.

kadai-paneer.title: Kadai Paneer
kadai-paneer.description: Paneer in tomato-onion gravy with bell peppers.

malai-kofta.title: Malai Kofta
malai-kofta.description: Paneer balls in creamy gravy. Vegetarian delight.

margherita-pizza.title: Margherita Pizza
margherita-pizza.description: Classic Italian pizza with tomato, mozzarella, basil.

masala-dosa.title: Masala Dosa
masala-dosa.description: Crispy fermented rice crepe with potato filling.

miso-soup.title: Miso Soup
miso-soup.description: Japanese soup with fermented soybean paste.
instructions: Prepare kombu dashi: soak kombu in cold water for 30 minutes, then heat until just before boiling. Remove kombu.
Bring kombu dashi to a gentle simmer.
Dissolve miso paste in a ladle with some dashi, then stir into the pot.
Add cubed tofu and rehydrated wakame.
Do not boil after adding miso.
Serve hot garnished with spring onion.

mutton-biryani.title: Mutton Biryani
instructions: Marinate mutton in yogurt for 3 hours.

oatmeal-with-berries.title: Oatmeal with Berries
oatmeal-with-berries.description: Healthy breakfast oatmeal with fresh berries.

pad-thai.title: Pad Thai
instructions: Make sauce with fish sauce and tamarind.

pani-puri.title: Pani Puri
pani-puri.description: Crispy puris with spiced water. Indian street food.
instructions: Make pani: mix tamarind water, mint, cumin.
Fill puris with potato and chana.

pasta-carbonara.title: Pasta Carbonara
pasta-carbonara.description: Italian pasta with eggs, cheese, and bacon.

pav-bhaji.title: Pav Bhaji
pav-bhaji.description: Spiced vegetable mash with buttered buns.

rasgulla.title: Rasgulla
rasgulla.description: Soft cottage cheese balls in syrup.

shakshuka.title: Shakshuka
shakshuka.description: Poached eggs in spiced tomato sauce.

tacos.title: Tacos
instructions: Top with sour cream and salsa.

veg-burger.title: Veggie Burger
instructions: Mix beans with oats and spices.

veg-fried-rice.title: Vegetable Fried Rice
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over high flame.
Add garlic and ginger, stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil, toss well.
Add cooked rice and mix until combined.
Garnish with chopped spring onion and serve hot.

chicken-fried-rice.title: Chicken Fried Rice
chicken-fried-rice.description: Wok-tossed rice with chicken, egg, and vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok and cook diced chicken until done.
Push the chicken to one side and scramble the eggs.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add cold cooked rice and break up any clumps.
Pour in soy sauce and sesame oil and toss well.
Serve hot straight from the wok.

double-patty-cheese-burger.title: Double Patty Cheese Burger
double-patty-cheese-burger.description: A hearty burger with two beef patties, melted cheese, and classic toppings.
instructions: Season the beef patties lightly with salt and pepper.
Cook the patties on a hot skillet until browned on both sides.
Top each patty with a slice of cheese and let it melt.
Toast the burger buns until lightly crisp.
Spread ketchup and mustard on the buns.
Layer lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, and two patties on each bun.

gelato.title: Gelato
gelato.description: Smooth Italian frozen dessert with a rich custard base.
instructions: Heat milk and cream in a saucepan until steaming but not boiling.
Whisk egg yolks with sugar until pale and thick.
Slowly whisk the hot milk mixture into the yolks.
Return the mixture to low heat and cook until it lightly coats a spoon.
Stir in vanilla and chill the custard completely.
Churn in an ice cream maker until thick and creamy.

macarons.title: French Macarons
macarons.description: Delicate almond meringue sandwich cookies with a simple buttercream filling.
instructions: Sift almond flour and powdered sugar together.
Whip the egg whites while gradually adding granulated sugar until stiff peaks form.
Fold the dry ingredients into the meringue until the batter flows slowly.
Pipe small circles onto a lined tray and rest until a skin forms.
Bake at 300 F until the shells are set.
Beat butter with extra powdered sugar and vanilla to make the filling.
Sandwich the cooled shells with the filling.

nachos-with-cheese.title: Nachos with Cheese
nachos-with-cheese.description: Crispy tortilla chips baked with cheese and classic toppings.
instructions: Spread tortilla chips on a baking tray.
Scatter black beans, jalapenos, and cheese over the chips.
Bake until the cheese is melted and bubbling.
Top with salsa, sour cream, and guacamole.

paneer-65.title: Paneer 65
paneer-65.description: Crispy fried paneer cubes tossed with curry leaves and spices.
instructions: Cut the paneer into bite-sized cubes.
Mix yogurt, rice flour, cornstarch, ginger-garlic paste, and chili powder into a thick marinade.
Coat the paneer cubes evenly and let them rest for 10 minutes.
Heat oil and fry the paneer until crisp at the edges.
Briefly fry the green chilies and curry leaves.
Toss the fried paneer with the curry leaves and chilies.
Serve hot as a snack or starter.

pepperoni-pizza.title: Pepperoni Pizza
pepperoni-pizza.description: Classic pizza with a crisp crust, mozzarella, and spicy pepperoni.
instructions: Mix flour, yeast, salt, and warm water to form a dough.
Knead until smooth and let the dough rise until doubled.
Stretch the dough into a pizza base.
Spread pizza sauce over the surface.
Top with mozzarella and pepperoni slices.
Bake at 475 F until the crust is golden and the cheese is bubbling.

scrambled-eggs.title: Scrambled Eggs
scrambled-eggs.description: Soft and creamy scrambled eggs for a quick breakfast.
instructions: Whisk eggs, milk, salt, and pepper together.
Melt butter in a nonstick pan over low heat.
Pour in the eggs and let them sit briefly.
Stir gently with a spatula as soft curds form.
Remove from the heat while the eggs are still slightly glossy.

sorbet.title: Fruit Sorbet
sorbet.description: Refreshing frozen fruit dessert made without dairy.
instructions: Heat sugar and water until the sugar fully dissolves.
Mix the syrup with fruit puree, lemon juice, and salt.
Churn in an ice cream maker until smooth and frozen.
Freeze for 1 to 2 hours to firm up.

vada-pav.title: Vada Pav
vada-pav.description: Mumbai street food with a spiced potato fritter tucked into a soft bun.
instructions: Temper mustard seeds, green chilies, and turmeric in a little oil.
Mix the tempering into the potatoes and shape into balls.
Make a thick batter with gram flour, water, and salt.
Dip the potato balls in batter and deep fry until golden.
Spread garlic chutney inside the pav buns.
Place a hot vada in each bun and serve.

rajma-masala.title: Rajma Masala
rajma-masala.description: Comforting North Indian curry made with kidney beans in a spiced onion-tomato gravy.
instructions: Heat oil and add cumin seeds.
Add ginger-garlic paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Stir in coriander powder and salt.
Add kidney beans and some water and simmer for 20 minutes.
Finish with garam masala and serve hot with rice.

chole-bhature.title: Chole Bhature
chole-bhature.description: Spiced chickpea curry served with soft, fried bhature bread.
instructions: Soak the chickpeas overnight and cook until tender.
Cook onion, ginger-garlic paste, and tomatoes into a masala.
Add chole masala and the cooked chickpeas and simmer.
Make a soft dough with flour, yogurt, baking powder, salt, and water.
Roll portions into discs and deep fry until puffed.
Serve the hot bhature with the chickpea curry.

matar-paneer.title: Matar Paneer
matar-paneer.description: Paneer and green peas cooked in a mildly spiced tomato gravy.
instructions: Heat oil and add cumin seeds.
Saute onion until soft and golden.
Add ginger-garlic paste and chopped tomatoes and cook into a thick masala.
Stir in coriander powder and salt.
Add green peas and a little water and cook until tender.
Add paneer cubes and simmer briefly.
Finish with cream and serve hot.

poha.title: Poha
poha.description: Flattened rice cooked with onions, peanuts, and gentle spices.
instructions: Rinse the poha quickly and let it soften.
Heat oil and fry the peanuts until crisp.
Add mustard seeds, curry leaves, onion, and diced potato and cook until the potato is tender.
Add the softened poha and toss gently.
Cook for 2 to 3 minutes until heated through.
Finish with lemon juice and serve.

upma.title: Upma
upma.description: Savory semolina breakfast cooked with aromatics and vegetables.
instructions: Dry roast the semolina until fragrant and set aside.
Heat oil and crackle mustard seeds.
Add curry leaves, chopped onion, green chilies, and ginger and saute.
Stir in the mixed vegetables and cook for a few minutes.
Pour in 3 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Slowly add semolina while stirring constantly.
Cook until the upma is fluffy and serve hot.

besan-chilla.title: Besan Chilla
besan-chilla.description: Savory gram flour pancakes packed with onion, tomato, and herbs.
instructions: Whisk gram flour with water to make a smooth batter.
Add chopped onion, tomato, green chili, coriander, cumin, turmeric, and salt.
Pour a ladle of batter and spread it into a thin round.
Cook until the underside is golden.
Flip and cook the other side.

gajar-halwa.title: Gajar Halwa
gajar-halwa.description: Traditional Indian carrot pudding slow-cooked with milk and ghee.
instructions: Cook the carrots in milk over medium heat until the milk reduces.
Add sugar and continue cooking until the mixture thickens.
Stir in ghee and cook until glossy.

kheer.title: Kheer
kheer.description: Creamy Indian rice pudding scented with cardamom and saffron.
instructions: Wash the rice and soak it for 20 minutes.
Bring milk to a gentle boil in a heavy pan.
Add the rice and cook on low heat, stirring often.
When the rice is soft, add sugar, cardamom, and saffron.
Simmer until the kheer is creamy and slightly thick.
Stir in chopped almonds and pistachios.

lemon-rice.title: Lemon Rice
lemon-rice.description: South Indian rice dish brightened with lemon and tempered spices.
instructions: Heat oil and fry the peanuts until lightly golden.
Add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and green chilies.
Add the cooked rice and toss gently.
Turn off the heat and add lemon juice.
Mix well so the rice stays fluffy.

curd-rice.title: Curd Rice
curd-rice.description: Cooling South Indian rice mixed with yogurt and a simple tempering.
instructions: Mash the cooked rice lightly while still warm.
Mix in yogurt, milk, and salt.
Heat oil and add mustard seeds.
Add curry leaves, chopped ginger, and green chili.
Pour the tempering over the rice mixture and stir well.
Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.

medu-vada.title: Medu Vada
medu-vada.description: Savory lentil fritters with a crisp exterior and soft center.
instructions: Soak the urad dal for 4 hours and drain well.
Grind it to a thick, fluffy batter using minimal water.
Mix in chopped chilies, ginger, curry leaves, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Wet your hands and shape portions into ring-shaped vadas.
Deep fry until golden and crisp on both sides.
Serve hot with chutney or sambar.

aloo-paratha.title: Aloo Paratha
aloo-paratha.description: Whole wheat flatbread stuffed with a spiced potato filling.
instructions: Knead the flour with water and salt into a soft dough.
Boil, peel, and mash the potatoes.
Mix the potatoes with onion, green chili, coriander, garam masala, and salt.
Divide the dough and filling into equal portions.
Stuff the dough with the potato filling and roll gently.
Cook on a hot griddle with ghee until both sides are golden.
Serve hot with yogurt or pickle.

bhindi-masala.title: Bhindi Masala
bhindi-masala.description: Tender okra cooked with onion, tomato, and dry spices.
instructions: Wash the okra and dry it thoroughly before slicing.
Heat oil and add cumin seeds.
Add onion and saute until light golden.
Stir in tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add turmeric, coriander powder, and salt.
Add the okra and cook uncovered until tender.

rogan-josh.title: Rogan Josh
rogan-josh.description: Aromatic Kashmiri-style lamb curry with a deep red gravy.
instructions: Heat oil and brown the mutton pieces.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened.
Stir in ginger-garlic paste and cook briefly.
Add yogurt, chili powder, fennel powder, and salt.
Pour in water, cover, and simmer until the meat is tender.
Serve hot with rice or naan.

vindaloo.title: Vindaloo
vindaloo.description: Tangy Goan curry with pork simmered in a fiery vinegar-based masala.
instructions: Blend vinegar, garlic, ginger, red chilies, and cumin into a paste.
Marinate the pork in the paste for at least 30 minutes.
Heat oil and cook sliced onion until golden.
Add the pork and sear it well.
Add water, cover, and simmer until the meat is tender.
Cook uncovered briefly to thicken the gravy.

tomato-rasam.title: Tomato Rasam
tomato-rasam.description: A peppery South Indian soup with tomato, tamarind, and spices.
instructions: Crush pepper, cumin, and garlic coarsely.
Boil chopped tomatoes with tamarind pulp and salt.
Add the cooked dal and enough water to make a light broth.
Stir in the crushed spice mixture and simmer briefly.
Heat oil separately and add mustard seeds and curry leaves.
Pour the tempering into the rasam.

misal-pav.title: Misal Pav
misal-pav.description: Spicy sprout curry topped with farsan and served with buttered pav.
instructions: Cook the sprouted beans until tender.
Heat oil and saute onion until golden.
Add tomatoes and cook down into a masala.
Stir in misal masala and salt.
Add the cooked sprouts and simmer for 10 minutes.
Top each serving with farsan and lemon juice.

moong-dal-khichdi.title: Moong Dal Khichdi
moong-dal-khichdi.description: Comforting one-pot rice and lentils cooked until soft and fragrant.
instructions: Wash the rice and moong dal together.
Heat ghee and add cumin seeds and ginger.
Add rice, dal, turmeric, peas, and salt.
Cook covered until very soft and porridge-like.
Stir well and adjust the consistency if needed.
Serve hot with yogurt or pickle.

kadhi-pakora.title: Kadhi Pakora
kadhi-pakora.description: Tangy yogurt curry with soft gram flour fritters.
instructions: Whisk yogurt with half the gram flour, turmeric, salt, and water.
Simmer the mixture gently until it thickens into kadhi.
Mix the remaining gram flour with sliced onion, chili powder, salt, and water to make a thick batter.
Drop spoonfuls into hot oil and fry pakoras until golden.
Heat a little oil and add cumin seeds and curry leaves.
Pour the tempering into the kadhi and add the pakoras.

kulfi.title: Kulfi
kulfi.description: Dense Indian frozen dessert flavored with cardamom and pistachios.
instructions: Simmer the milk until it reduces by about one third.
Whisk in condensed milk and milk powder until smooth.
Add sugar, cardamom, saffron, and pistachios.
Cook for 2 more minutes and let the mixture cool.

ramen.title: Ramen
ramen.description: Japanese noodle soup with a savory broth, vegetables, and soft eggs.
instructions: Boil the eggs for 6 to 7 minutes, cool, and peel.
Bring the broth to a simmer.
Stir in soy sauce and miso paste until dissolved.
Add mushrooms and bok choy and cook until tender.
Boil the ramen noodles separately until just cooked.
Divide the noodles among bowls and pour over the hot broth.
Top with halved eggs and spring onions.

bibimbap.title: Bibimbap
bibimbap.description: Korean rice bowl topped with beef, vegetables, egg, and chili sauce.
instructions: Season the beef lightly and stir-fry it until cooked.
Saute spinach, carrot, and mushrooms separately with a little salt.
Fry the eggs until the whites are set.
Divide hot rice among serving bowls.
Arrange the beef and vegetables over the rice.
Top each bowl with a fried egg and a spoonful of gochujang.
Drizzle with sesame oil and mix before eating.

kimchi-fried-rice.title: Kimchi Fried Rice
kimchi-fried-rice.description: Spicy fried rice with kimchi, egg, and a hint of sesame.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and saute chopped garlic.
Add kimchi and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in the rice and break up any clumps.
Add gochujang, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Toss until the rice is evenly coated and hot.
Top the fried rice with spring onion and eggs.

teriyaki-chicken.title: Teriyaki Chicken
teriyaki-chicken.description: Pan-glazed chicken with a sweet and savory teriyaki sauce.
instructions: Mix soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, garlic, and ginger.
Heat oil in a skillet and sear the chicken thighs until browned.
Pour in the sauce and lower the heat.
Cook until the chicken is tender and glazed.
Turn the chicken to coat it evenly.

yakisoba.title: Yakisoba
yakisoba.description: Japanese stir-fried noodles with vegetables and savory sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok and cook sliced chicken until done.
Add ginger, cabbage, and carrot and stir-fry until just tender.
Add the noodles and loosen them with a splash of water if needed.
Pour in soy sauce and oyster sauce.
Toss everything together until evenly coated.

mapo-tofu.title: Mapo Tofu
mapo-tofu.description: Silky tofu simmered in a spicy Sichuan-style meat sauce.
instructions: Cut the tofu into cubes and set aside.
Heat oil and cook the ground pork until browned.
Add garlic, ginger, and doubanjiang and fry briefly.
Pour in the stock and bring to a simmer.
Add the tofu and cook gently for a few minutes.
Stir in cornstarch mixed with water to thicken the sauce.
Finish with spring onions and serve hot with rice.

dan-dan-noodles.title: Dan Dan Noodles
dan-dan-noodles.description: Spicy noodles tossed in a rich sesame and chili sauce with pork.
instructions: Cook the noodles until tender and drain.
Brown the ground pork in a pan.
Add garlic and cook until fragrant.
Whisk sesame paste, soy sauce, chili oil, and broth into a smooth sauce.
Toss the noodles with the sauce and pork.
Top with bok choy and serve.

tom-yum-soup.title: Tom Yum Soup
tom-yum-soup.description: Hot and sour Thai soup with shrimp, herbs, and mushrooms.
instructions: Bring 5 cups of water to a simmer.
Add bruised lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, ginger, and chilies.
Simmer for 5 minutes to flavor the broth.
Add mushrooms and cook until tender.
Add shrimp and cook until just pink.
Season with fish sauce and lime juice.

chicken-satay.title: Chicken Satay
chicken-satay.description: Grilled marinated chicken skewers served with a peanut dipping sauce.
instructions: Marinate it with coconut milk, curry powder, turmeric, garlic, and salt.
Grill or pan-sear until cooked through.
Warm the peanut butter with soy sauce, lime juice, and a splash of water.
Serve the chicken with the peanut sauce.

pho.title: Pho
pho.description: Vietnamese noodle soup with aromatic broth, beef, and fresh garnishes.
instructions: Char the onion and ginger lightly in a dry pan.
Simmer the broth with onion, ginger, star anise, and fish sauce.
Cook the rice noodles separately until tender.
Place the noodles in serving bowls.
Pour the hot broth over the beef so it cooks gently.
Serve with bean sprouts on top.

banh-mi.title: Banh Mi
banh-mi.description: Vietnamese sandwich with seasoned pork, pickled vegetables, and herbs.
instructions: Slice the pork thinly and season it with soy sauce and salt.
Cook the pork in a hot pan until browned.
Split the baguette rolls and spread mayonnaise inside.
Add pickled carrots, cucumber slices, and cilantro.
Press lightly so the filling stays in place.

katsu-curry.title: Katsu Curry
katsu-curry.description: Breaded chicken cutlet served with Japanese-style curry sauce and rice.
instructions: Coat the chicken in flour, egg, and panko breadcrumbs.
Pan-fry until golden and cooked through, then slice.
Cook onion and diced potatoes in a saucepan.
Add curry powder, salt, and 2 cups of water and simmer until thick.

korean-fried-chicken.title: Korean Fried Chicken
korean-fried-chicken.description: Crispy chicken coated in a sticky spicy-sweet glaze.
instructions: Pat the chicken wings dry and season lightly.
Coat them with flour and cornstarch.
Deep fry until crisp and cooked through.
Mix gochujang, soy sauce, honey, and minced garlic in a small pan.
Toss the hot fried chicken in the sauce.

bulgogi.title: Bulgogi
bulgogi.description: Thinly sliced beef marinated in a sweet soy mixture and quickly cooked.
instructions: Blend pear, soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil, and garlic into a marinade.
Mix the beef with the marinade and sliced onion.
Cook the beef quickly in a hot skillet.
Stir in spring onions at the end.

tempura-udon.title: Tempura Udon
tempura-udon.description: Udon noodle soup topped with crisp shrimp tempura.
instructions: Simmer the dashi stock with soy sauce.
Cook the udon noodles separately and divide among bowls.
Make a light batter with flour, egg, and cold water.
Dip the shrimp in the batter and fry until crisp.
Pour the hot broth over the noodles.
Top each bowl with shrimp tempura and spring onion.

thai-basil-chicken.title: Thai Basil Chicken
thai-basil-chicken.description: Stir-fried chicken with garlic, chilies, and fragrant Thai basil.
instructions: Stir-fry garlic and chilies until fragrant.
Add onion and cook for 1 minute.
Add ground chicken and cook until browned.
Season with soy sauce and oyster sauce.
Toss in the basil leaves until wilted.

congee.title: Congee
congee.description: Slow-cooked rice porridge with chicken and ginger.
instructions: Rinse the rice and add it to the chicken stock.
Bring to a boil, then reduce to a low simmer.
Add ginger and cook until the rice breaks down and turns creamy.
Poach the chicken breast in the porridge and shred it.
Return the chicken to the pot.
Season with soy sauce, sesame oil, and white pepper.
Serve hot topped with spring onions.

nasi-goreng.title: Nasi Goreng
nasi-goreng.description: Indonesian fried rice with chicken, egg, and sweet soy flavor.
instructions: Heat oil and saute shallots, garlic, and chilies.
Add diced chicken and cook until done.
Push everything aside and scramble the eggs.
Add the cooked rice and toss well.
Season with sweet soy sauce and salt.
Cook until the rice is hot and slightly smoky.

dumplings.title: Dumplings
dumplings.description: Pan-fried dumplings filled with seasoned chicken and cabbage.
instructions: Mix ground chicken, finely chopped cabbage, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, and spring onion.
Place a spoonful of filling in each wrapper.
Heat oil in a skillet and place the dumplings flat-side down.
Cook until the bottoms are golden.
Add a splash of water, cover, and steam until cooked through.

okonomiyaki.title: Okonomiyaki
okonomiyaki.description: Japanese savory pancake with cabbage, bacon, and tangy sauce.
instructions: Mix flour, eggs, and dashi into a smooth batter.
Fold in shredded cabbage and chopped spring onions.
Heat oil in a skillet and pour in the batter.
Lay bacon slices over the top.
Cook until the underside is golden, then flip carefully.
Cook the other side until done.
Drizzle with sauce and mayonnaise before serving.

lasagna.title: Lasagna
lasagna.description: Layered baked pasta with meat sauce, cheese, and tender sheets of pasta.
instructions: Heat olive oil and saute onion until soft.
Add ground beef and cook until browned.
Pour in tomato sauce and simmer for 15 minutes.
Spread a little sauce in a baking dish.
Layer lasagna sheets, meat sauce, ricotta, and mozzarella.
Repeat the layers and finish with parmesan on top.
Bake until bubbly and golden, then rest before slicing.

mushroom-risotto.title: Mushroom Risotto
mushroom-risotto.description: Creamy Italian rice slowly cooked with mushrooms and stock.
instructions: Heat the stock and keep it warm.
Cook onion in olive oil and butter until soft.
Add mushrooms and cook until browned.
Stir in the rice and toast for 1 minute.
Pour in the white wine and let it absorb.
Add warm stock a ladle at a time, stirring until creamy.
Finish with parmesan and serve immediately.

gnocchi-pesto.title: Gnocchi al Pesto
gnocchi-pesto.description: Tender potato gnocchi tossed with bright basil pesto.
instructions: Blend basil, parmesan, pine nuts, garlic, and olive oil into a pesto.
Boil the gnocchi until they float to the surface.
Drain the gnocchi, reserving a splash of cooking water.
Toss the gnocchi with the pesto.
Add a little cooking water if needed to loosen the sauce.

bruschetta.title: Bruschetta
bruschetta.description: Toasted bread topped with fresh tomatoes, basil, and olive oil.
instructions: Slice the baguette and toast the pieces until crisp.
Rub each slice lightly with a cut garlic clove.
Dice the tomatoes and mix them with basil, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and salt.
Spoon the tomato mixture over the toasted bread.
Let the juices soak in slightly.

caprese-salad.title: Caprese Salad
caprese-salad.description: Simple Italian salad of tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil.
instructions: Arrange them alternately on a serving plate.
Tuck basil leaves between the slices.

minestrone.title: Minestrone
minestrone.description: Italian vegetable soup with beans, pasta, and tomato broth.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot.
Cook onion, carrot, and celery until softened.
Pour in 5 cups of water and bring to a simmer.
Add beans and cook for 10 minutes.
Add pasta and cook until tender.

chicken-parmesan.title: Chicken Parmesan
chicken-parmesan.description: Breaded chicken baked with marinara and melted cheese.
instructions: Coat them in flour, beaten egg, and breadcrumbs.
Pan-fry until golden on both sides.
Place the chicken in a baking dish.
Top with marinara, mozzarella, and parmesan.
Bake until the cheese melts and the chicken is cooked through.

focaccia.title: Focaccia
focaccia.description: Soft Italian flatbread with olive oil, rosemary, and sea salt.
instructions: Mix flour, yeast, salt, and warm water into a sticky dough.
Let the dough rise until doubled in size.
Spread it into an oiled baking pan.
Dimple the surface with your fingertips.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with rosemary and a little extra salt.

panna-cotta.title: Panna Cotta
panna-cotta.description: Silky Italian dessert set with cream, vanilla, and gelatin.
instructions: Sprinkle gelatin over a little cold water and let it bloom.
Heat cream, milk, and sugar until steaming.
Stir in vanilla and the bloomed gelatin until dissolved.

ratatouille.title: Ratatouille
ratatouille.description: French vegetable stew with eggplant, zucchini, peppers, and tomatoes.
instructions: Cut all the vegetables into even pieces.
Heat olive oil and soften the onion and garlic.
Add eggplant and bell peppers and cook for a few minutes.
Season with thyme, salt, and pepper.
Simmer gently until all the vegetables are tender.

moussaka.title: Moussaka
moussaka.description: Greek baked casserole with eggplant, lamb, and creamy topping.
instructions: Slice the eggplant and cook the slices until tender.
Heat olive oil and cook onion and lamb until browned.
Add chopped tomatoes and simmer into a thick sauce.
Make a simple bechamel with butter, flour, and milk.
Layer eggplant and lamb sauce in a baking dish.

spanakopita.title: Spanakopita
spanakopita.description: Greek pastry filled with spinach, feta, and herbs.
instructions: Cook the onion until soft and add the spinach until wilted.
Let the spinach mixture cool slightly.
Mix with crumbled feta, eggs, dill, and salt.
Brush phyllo sheets with olive oil and layer them in a baking dish.
Fold over or top with more phyllo and brush with oil.

tabbouleh.title: Tabbouleh
tabbouleh.description: Fresh herb salad with bulgur, tomato, cucumber, and lemon.
instructions: Soak the bulgur in hot water until tender, then drain well.
Finely chop the parsley and mint.
Mix the bulgur with the herbs and vegetables.
Dress with lemon juice, olive oil, and salt.
Toss well so everything is evenly coated.

baba-ganoush.title: Baba Ganoush
baba-ganoush.description: Smoky eggplant dip blended with tahini, garlic, and lemon.
instructions: Roast the eggplants until the skins are charred and the flesh is soft.
Cool slightly and scoop out the flesh.
Blend the eggplant with tahini, garlic, lemon juice, and salt.
Adjust the texture with a little olive oil.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle parsley on top.

lamb-kofta.title: Lamb Kofta
lamb-kofta.description: Spiced ground lamb skewers cooked until juicy and lightly charred.
instructions: Mix lamb with grated onion, parsley, cumin, coriander, garlic, and salt.
Shape the mixture into long koftas around skewers or into logs.
Cook on a grill pan or skillet until browned and cooked through.
Turn them a few times for even cooking.
Serve with yogurt on the side.

chicken-souvlaki.title: Chicken Souvlaki
chicken-souvlaki.description: Greek marinated chicken skewers served with yogurt and cucumber.
instructions: Marinate with lemon juice, garlic, oregano, olive oil, and salt.
Thread onto skewers and cook until lightly charred and fully cooked.
Grate the cucumber and mix it with yogurt and a pinch of salt.
Serve the chicken with pita and the yogurt-cucumber sauce.

paella.title: Paella
paella.description: Spanish rice dish with saffron, chicken, shrimp, and peas.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wide pan and brown the chicken pieces.
Add grated tomato and paprika and cook briefly.
Stir in the rice so it is coated in the oil.
Add broth and saffron and bring to a simmer.
Cook without stirring until the rice starts to soften.
Add shrimp and peas and continue cooking until the liquid is absorbed.

gazpacho.title: Gazpacho
gazpacho.description: Chilled Spanish tomato soup with fresh vegetables and olive oil.
instructions: Roughly chop the tomatoes, cucumber, bell pepper, and onion.
Soak the bread briefly in water and squeeze it out.
Blend all the vegetables with bread, garlic, olive oil, vinegar, and salt.
Taste and adjust the seasoning before serving.

beef-stroganoff.title: Beef Stroganoff
beef-stroganoff.description: Tender beef and mushrooms in a creamy sauce served over noodles.
instructions: Cook the egg noodles and set aside.
Melt butter in a skillet and brown the beef strips quickly.
Remove the beef and cook onion and mushrooms in the same pan.
Add paprika and pour in the beef broth.
Stir in sour cream and return the beef to the pan.

shepherds-pie.title: Shepherds Pie
shepherds-pie.description: Comforting casserole of lamb and vegetables topped with mashed potatoes.
instructions: Boil the potatoes until tender and mash them with butter and salt.
Cook the onion and carrots until softened.
Add the lamb and brown it well.
Stir in tomato paste, peas, and broth and simmer until thickened.
Transfer the lamb mixture to a baking dish.
Spread the mashed potatoes over the top.
Bake until the top is lightly golden.

clam-chowder.title: Clam Chowder
clam-chowder.description: Creamy chowder with clams, potatoes, bacon, and onion.
instructions: Cook the bacon until crisp and set it aside.
Saute onion and celery in the bacon drippings and butter.
Add diced potatoes and enough water to just cover them.
Cook until the potatoes are tender.
Stir in milk, cream, and clams and heat gently.

banana-bread.title: Banana Bread
banana-bread.description: Moist quick bread made with ripe bananas and warm vanilla flavor.
instructions: Whisk in melted butter, eggs, sugar, and vanilla.
Fold in flour, baking soda, and a pinch of salt.
Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
Bake until a skewer inserted in the center comes out clean.

cinnamon-rolls.title: Cinnamon Rolls
cinnamon-rolls.description: Soft sweet rolls swirled with cinnamon sugar and finished with icing.
instructions: Make a soft dough with flour, yeast, warm milk, a little sugar, and part of the butter.
Let the dough rise until doubled.
Spread with butter and sprinkle with brown sugar and cinnamon.
Roll up tightly and cut into pieces.
Arrange in a baking dish, let rise again, and bake until golden.
Spread with softened cream cheese icing while warm.

carrot-cake.title: Carrot Cake
carrot-cake.description: Tender cake made with grated carrots and warm spices.
instructions: Whisk eggs, sugar, and oil until smooth.
Fold in flour, cinnamon, baking powder, and a pinch of salt.
Pour into a greased cake pan and bake until set.
Top with cream cheese frosting before serving.

apple-crisp.title: Apple Crisp
apple-crisp.description: Baked apples topped with a buttery oat crumble.
instructions: Toss the apples with lemon juice and a little cinnamon.
Spread them in a baking dish.
Rub together oats, flour, brown sugar, butter, and the remaining cinnamon to form a crumble.
Sprinkle the crumble over the apples.
Bake until the apples are tender and the topping is golden.
